headline: Holiday Sales Show Omnichannel Presence As Important As Ever
summary: While there was much uncertainty headed into the 2020 holiday shopping season, our thesis that retailers with an omnichannel presence (brick-and-mortar, mobile and online) would outperform, proved correct.
